keyFeatures.en: Generate logo, business cards, website and social designs in seconds with AI.
keyFeatures.zh: 使用AI在几秒钟内生成标志、名片、网站和社交媒体设计。

keyFeatures.en: Easy to use with no design experience needed.
keyFeatures.zh: 无需设计经验即可轻松使用。

keyFeatures.en: Free to try with no credit card required.

description.en: Unlimited access to logo, business card, website and social design templates. No credit card required.
description.zh: 无限访问标志、名片、网站和社交媒体设计模板。无需信用卡。

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options compared to paid plans.
weaknesses.zh: 与付费计划相比，自定义选项有限。

weaknesses.en: No customer support available for free users.
weaknesses.zh: 免费用户无法获得客户支持。

targetAudience.en: Small businesses and entrepreneurs who need quick and easy design solutions.
targetAudience.zh: 需要快速简便设计解决方案的小企业和创业者。

positioning.en: Design.com positions itself as a user-friendly AI-driven design platform for small businesses and individuals.
positioning.zh: Design.com 将自己定位为面向小企业和个人的用户友好型 AI 驱动设计平台。
